class.name: QueryContext2D
class.brief_description: Acts as a reference for [QueryGenerator2D]s and [QueryTest2D]s, providing [Node2D]s and/or [Vector2]s in an [Array].

method.name: _get_context
method.description: Called on [QueryGenerator2D]s and [QueryTest2Ds] to get a list of [Node2Ds] and/or [Vector2]s. [b]Note:[/b] Must be overrwritten.

method.name: get_context
method.description: Called on [QueryGenerator2D]s and [QueryTest2Ds] to get a list of [Node2Ds] and/or [Vector2]s.

method.name: get_context_positions
method.description: Returns only the positions of each context. Used in some [QueryTest2D]s where collisions aren't needed.
